"cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1333", "name": "Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity"}], "description": "### Impact

multiparty@4.2.3 and lower versions are vulnerable to denial of service via regular expression backtracking in the `Content-Disposition` filename parameter parser. A multipart upload with a long header value containing `!filename="1` repeated can cause regex matching to take seconds, blocking the event loop. Any service accepting multipart uploads via multiparty is affected.

### Patches

Users should upgrade to multiparty@4.3.0 or higher.

### Workarounds

None. Limiting upload sizes at the proxy/gateway layer reduces but does not eliminate the attack surface, since a small ~8 KB header is sufficient to trigger the vulnerable backtracking.

### Resources

- [OWASP: Regular expression Denial of Service (ReDoS)](https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/Regular_expression_Denial_of_Service_-_ReDoS)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00335, "percentile": 0.25513}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-65x3-rw7q-gx94", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T17:40:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-65x3-rw7q-gx94", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-65x3-rw7q-gx94"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8159"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T10:16:48Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T17:40:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pillarjs/multiparty/security/advisories/GHSA-65x3-rw7q-gx94", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8159", "https://cna.openjsf.org/security-advisories.html", "https://github.com/pillarjs/multiparty/releases/tag/v4.3.0", "https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/Regular_expression_Denial_of_Service_-_ReDoS", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-65x3-rw7q-gx94"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pillarjs/multiparty/security-advisories/GHSA-65x3-rw7q-gx94", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pillarjs/multiparty", "summary": "multiparty vulnerable to ReDoS via filename parsing", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T17:40:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-65x3-rw7q-gx94", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.3.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "multiparty"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.2.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: multiparty vulnerable to ReDoS via filename parsing
